name: beyblade-game-server
description: Colyseus game server for Beyblade battles

scripts.docker:dev: concurrently "npm run docker:up && npm run docker:logs" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.seed:all: node scripts/seed-admin.js && node scripts/seed-settings.js && node scripts/seed-beyblades.js && node scripts/seed-arenas.js && node scripts/seed-special-moves.js && node scripts/seed-2d-parts.js && node scripts/seed-beyblade-systems.js && node scripts/seed-arena-systems.js && node scripts/seed-combos.js && node scripts/seed-ai-battles.js && node scripts/seed-tournament-ai-solo.js && node scripts/seed-round-modifiers.js && node scripts/seed-behavior-defs.js && node scripts/seed-combo-effects.js && node scripts/seed-particle-presets.js && node scripts/seed-animation-presets.js
scripts.reseed: node scripts/clear-all.js && node scripts/seed-admin.js && node scripts/seed-beyblades.js && node scripts/seed-arenas.js && node scripts/seed-special-moves.js && node scripts/seed-2d-parts.js && node scripts/seed-beyblade-systems.js && node scripts/seed-arena-systems.js && node scripts/seed-combos.js && node scripts/seed-ai-battles.js && node scripts/seed-tournament-ai-solo.js && node scripts/seed-round-modifiers.js && node scripts/seed-behavior-defs.js && node scripts/seed-combo-effects.js && node scripts/seed-particle-presets.js && node scripts/seed-animation-presets.js
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:client && npm run deploy:rules
scripts.deploy:client: cd client && npm run build && cd .. && firebase deploy --only hosting

author: JustForView.in
